title: HTML Elements
content:
### HTML Elements An **HTML element** is everything from the start tag to the end tag. --- ### Element Syntax ```html Content goes here... ``` **Example:** ```html

This is a paragraph.

``` --- ### Nested Elements Elements can be placed inside other elements: ```html

This is bold text.

``` --- ### Block vs Inline Elements | Type | Behavior | Examples | |------|----------|---------| | **Block** | Starts on new line, takes full width | `
`, `

`, `

` | | **Inline** | Stays on same line | ``, ``, `` | --- ### Void Elements Some elements do not have a closing tag: ```html
``` --- ### Case Insensitivity HTML tags are **not** case-sensitive: ```html

This works

But lowercase is standard

``` > **Best Practice:** Always use **lowercase** tags. Use closing tags even for optional ones (like `

`).
codeExample:
This is a heading

This is a paragraph.

This is a link
This is a block element
This is inline

quiz.question: What is an HTML element?
options: Everything from start tag to end tag
